name: AWS EC2
description: This app integrates with AWS Elastic Compute Cloud (EC2) to perform virtualization actions

actions.name: Start Instance
actions.description: Start one or more instances

parameters.name: instance_ids
parameters.description: One or more instance IDs, separated by commas

parameters.name: dry_run
parameters.description: Check if asset has required permissions for the action

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

actions.name: Stop Instance
actions.description: Stop one or more instances

parameters.name: instance_ids
parameters.description: One or more instance IDs, separated by commas

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: Forces the instances to stop

parameters.name: dry_run
parameters.description: Check if asset has required permissions for the action

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

actions.name: Describe Instance
actions.description: Describe one or more instances

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: One or more filters, separated by commas

parameters.name: instance_ids
parameters.description: One or more instance IDs, separated by commas

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of results to be fetched

parameters.name: dry_run
parameters.description: Check if asset has required permissions for the action

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

actions.name: Create Security Group
actions.description: Creates a security group

parameters.name: group_name
parameters.description: The name of the security group

parameters.name: group_description
parameters.description: A description for the security group

parameters.name: tag_specifications
parameters.description: The tags to assign to the security group

parameters.name: vpc_id
parameters.description: The ID of the VPC

parameters.name: dry_run
parameters.description: Check if asset has required permissions for the action

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

actions.name: Delete Security Group
actions.description: Deletes a security group

parameters.name: group_id
parameters.description: The ID of the security group

parameters.name: group_name
parameters.description: The name of the security group

parameters.name: dry_run
parameters.description: Check if asset has required permissions for the action

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

actions.name: Describe Snapshots
actions.description: Describe one or more snapshots

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: One or more filters, separated by commas

parameters.name: snapshot_ids
parameters.description: One or more snapshot IDs, separated by commas

parameters.name: restorable_by
parameters.description: The IDs of the AWS accounts that can create volumes from the snapshot

parameters.name: owners
parameters.description: Scopes the results to snapshots with the specified owners. You can specify a combination of AWS account IDs, self, and amazon

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of results to be fetched

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

parameters.name: dry_run
parameters.description: Check if asset has required permissions for the action

actions.name: Copy Snapshot
actions.description: Copies a point-in-time snapshot of an EBS volume and stores it in Amazon S3

parameters.name: source_region
parameters.description: The ID of the region that contains the snapshot to be copied

parameters.name: source_snapshot_id
parameters.description: The ID of the EBS snapshot to copy

parameters.name: destination_region
parameters.description: The destination region to use in the 'presigned url' parameter of a snapshot copy operation

parameters.name: kms_key_id
parameters.description: The identifier of the AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) KMS key to use for Amazon EBS encryption

parameters.name: presigned_url
parameters.description: When you copy an encrypted source snapshot using the Amazon EC2 Query API, you must supply a pre-signed URL

parameters.name: encrypted
parameters.description: To encrypt a copy of an unencrypted snapshot if encryption by default is not enabled, enable encryption using this parameter

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: A description for the EBS snapshot

parameters.name: tag_specifications
parameters.description: The tags to apply to the snapshot during creation, separated by commas

parameters.name: dry_run
parameters.description: Check if asset has required permissions for the action

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

actions.name: Describe Vpcs
actions.description: Describe one or more vpcs

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: One or more filters, separated by commas

parameters.name: vpc_ids
parameters.description: One or more vpc IDs, separated by commas

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of results to be fetched

parameters.name: dry_run
parameters.description: Check if asset has required permissions for the action

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

actions.name: Describe Images
actions.description: Describe one or more images

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: One or more filters, separated by commas

parameters.name: image_ids
parameters.description: One or more images IDs, separated by commas

parameters.name: executable_users
parameters.description: Scopes the images by users with explicit launch permissions

parameters.name: owners
parameters.description: Scopes the results to images with the specified owners

parameters.name: dry_run
parameters.description: Check if asset has required permissions for the action

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

actions.name: Describe Subnets
actions.description: Describe one or more subnets

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: One or more filters, separated by commas

parameters.name: subnet_ids
parameters.description: One or more subnet IDs, separated by commas

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of results to be fetched

parameters.name: dry_run
parameters.description: Check if asset has required permissions for the action

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

actions.name: Detach Instance
actions.description: Detach an instance from an autoscaling group

parameters.name: instance_ids
parameters.description: Up to 20 IDs of the instances, separated by commas

parameters.name: autoscaling_group_name
parameters.description: The name of the autoscaling group

parameters.name: should_decrement_desired_capacity
parameters.description: Decrement the desired capacity value by the number of instances being detached

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

actions.name: Attach Instance
actions.description: Attach an instance to an autoscaling group

parameters.name: instance_ids
parameters.description: Up to 20 IDs of the instances, separated by commas

parameters.name: autoscaling_group_name
parameters.description: The name of the autoscaling group

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

actions.name: Delete Vpc
actions.description: Delete a VPC

parameters.name: vpc_id
parameters.description: VPC id

parameters.name: dry_run
parameters.description: Check if asset has required permissions for the action

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

actions.name: Register Instance
actions.description: Register an instance to a Classic AWS Elastic Load Balancer

parameters.name: load_balancer_name
parameters.description: Name of the classic load balancer

parameters.name: instance_ids
parameters.description: One or more instance IDs, separated by commas

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

actions.name: Deregister Instance
actions.description: Deregister an instance from a Classic AWS Elastic Load Balancer

parameters.name: load_balancer_name
parameters.description: Name of the classic load balancer

parameters.name: instance_ids
parameters.description: One or more instance IDs, separated by commas

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

actions.name: Delete Snapshot
actions.description: Delete snapshot of given AWS instance

parameters.name: snapshot_id
parameters.description: Snapshot ID

parameters.name: dry_run
parameters.description: Check if asset has required permissions for the action

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

actions.name: Snapshot Instance
actions.description: Snapshot AWS instance that has the given IP address or instance ID

parameters.name: volume_id
parameters.description: The ID of the Elastic Block Store (EBS) volume

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: A description of the snapshot

parameters.name: tag_specifications
parameters.description: The tags to apply to the snapshot during creation, separated by commas

parameters.name: dry_run
parameters.description: Check if asset has required permissions for the action

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

actions.name: Get Tag
actions.description: Get the value of a tag for the given instance ID

parameters.name: instance_id
parameters.description: Instance ID

parameters.name: tag_key
parameters.description: Tag key

parameters.name: dry_run
parameters.description: Check if asset has required permissions for the action

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

actions.name: Add Tag
actions.description: Add a tag to an instance

parameters.name: instance_id
parameters.description: The ID of the instance

parameters.name: tag_key
parameters.description: Tag key

parameters.name: tag_value
parameters.description: Tag value. Defaults to an empty string if left blank

parameters.name: dry_run
parameters.description: Check if asset has required permissions for the action

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

actions.name: Remove Tag
actions.description: Remove specified tag from an instance

parameters.name: instance_id
parameters.description: The ID of the instance

parameters.name: tag_key
parameters.description: Tag key

parameters.name: tag_value
parameters.description: Tag value. If not specified, all tags with tag_key will be removed. If empty string "" is specified, then tag_key with value of empty string will be removed

parameters.name: dry_run
parameters.description: Check if asset has required permissions for the action

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

actions.name: Get Acls
actions.description: Get one or more network ACLs

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: One or more filters in dictionary format, separated by commas

parameters.name: dry_run
parameters.description: Check if asset has required permissions for the action

parameters.name: network_acl_ids
parameters.description: One or more network ACL IDs, separated by commas

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

actions.name: Add Acl
actions.description: Add ACL to an instance

parameters.name: vpc_id
parameters.description: The ID of the virtual private cloud (VPC)

parameters.name: dry_run
parameters.description: Check if asset has required permissions for the action

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

actions.name: Remove Acl
actions.description: Remove ACL from an instance. The default network ACL and ACLs associated with any subnets cannot be deleted

parameters.name: network_acl_id
parameters.description: The ID of the network ACL

parameters.name: dry_run
parameters.description: Check if asset has required permissions for the action

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

actions.name: List Security Groups
actions.description: Describe one or more security groups

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: One or more filters in dictionary format, separated by commas

parameters.name: dry_run
parameters.description: Check if asset has required permissions for the action

parameters.name: group_ids
parameters.description: One or more security group IDs, separated by commas. Required for security groups in a non-default VPC

parameters.name: group_names
parameters.description: One or more security group names, separated by commas

parameters.name: next_token
parameters.description: The token to request the next page of results

parameters.name: max_results
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return in a single call

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

actions.name: Assign Instance
actions.description: Assign an instance to a security group

parameters.name: instance_id
parameters.description: The ID of the instance

parameters.name: group_id
parameters.description: The security group ID to add

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

actions.name: Remove Instance
actions.description: Removes an instance from a security group

parameters.name: instance_id
parameters.description: The ID of the instance

parameters.name: group_id
parameters.description: The security group ID to remove

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

actions.name: Create Vpc
actions.description: Create a VPC with the specified IPv4 CIDR block

parameters.name: cidr_block
parameters.description: The IPv4 network range for the VPC, in CIDR notation. For example: 10.0.0.0/16

parameters.name: amazon_provided_ipv6_cidr_block
parameters.description: The Amazon provided IPv6 CIDR block with a /56 prefix length

parameters.name: dry_run
parameters.description: Check if asset has required permissions for the action

parameters.name: instance_tenancy
parameters.description: The tenancy options for instances launched into the VPC

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

actions.name: List Network Interfaces
actions.description: Display network interfaces

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: One or more filters in dictionary format, separated by commas

parameters.name: dry_run
parameters.description: Check if asset has required permissions for the action

parameters.name: network_interface_ids
parameters.description: One or more network interface IDs, separated by commas

parameters.name: next_token
parameters.description: The token to request the next page of results

parameters.name: max_results
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return in a single call

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

actions.name: List Autoscaling Groups
actions.description: Display autoscaling groups

parameters.name: autoscaling_group_names
parameters.description: The names of the Auto Scaling groups, separated by commas

parameters.name: next_token
parameters.description: The token for the next set of items to return

parameters.name: max_results
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return in a single call

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials
